title: Address repository maturity review findings
outOfScope: Adding a minimal or interactive installation mode
Changing governance runtime semantics beyond installer upgrade safety

riskAssessment.reason: Installer upgrade behavior affects user-authored agent rules; documentation checks touch repository governance entrypoints.

executionDecision.reason: The reported defects are reproducible and have bounded implementation and verification paths.

preReviewWarnings: Review preservation of unmarked agent rule files during upgrade.
Review documentation check scope to avoid language-specific false positives.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All three README quick-install commands produce a Makefile containing ai-start.
Upgrade preserves pre-existing unmarked AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, and CLAUDE.md content and adds a managed section.
Supported stack lists include android and describe presets as customizable starting points with tool prerequisites.
The specifically reported Japanese and repository glossary terminology defects are corrected.
A Make target validates Markdown front matter and supported-stack consistency, with regression tests.
All Contract-required AI and project checks pass.
guidelines: Preserve user-authored files during installer upgrades.
Keep documentation checks language-neutral, dependency-free, and driven by the installer stack registry.
Do not hand-edit generated cockpit status.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly requested correction of the reported governance documentation and missing documentation quality gate.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
